channel.title: asciiname on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in asciiname on IT notes

item.title: asciinema
item.description: asciinema [as-kee-nuh-muh] is a free and open source solution for recording terminal sessions and sharing them on the web. Install FreeBSD: pkg install asciiname OS X: brew update && brew install asciinema Recording tmux session Setup your tmux session create windows, splits, start processes in them: tmux new -s name Detach (prefix+d) and start recording with: asciinema rec -c "tmux attach -t name" /tmp/play.json When you’re finished, just detach the session again and play it with:
